title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tech Mahindra Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tech Mahindra Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Tech Mahindra Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tech Mahindra Holdings Services:
Tech Mahindra Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra Holdings Services!
